results.title: Cloudglue: Let your AI understand videos and audio | Product Hunt
results.content:
We were driven to solve this problem.  
  
Our journey  
Over the last 6 months, we've focused intensively on advancing video understanding through cutting-edge research, and drawing on our experiences building infrastructure, search, and video ML at AWS and Snap to create the APIs we wished existed.

(Our amazing design partners have also been instrumental in shaping what we're launching today! 💫)  
  
💫 Introducing Cloudglue  
Simple, lightning-fast, developer-friendly APIs with cutting-edge video understanding at its core - Cloudglue makes it effortless to add video insights to your AI.

We've made it as easy to tap into video knowledge as text documents, enabling AI agents to see and hear as well as humans can.  
  
How it works: [...] Extract - the entities you request referenced from all the multimodal signals from the video

Chat completions - you can flexibly Q&A on your video to generate any kind of report. I'd highly recommend trying our MCP server for this one!

Sherwood Callaway
Opkit

Opkit

11x engineering manager here. We use Cloudglue to add video support to our knowledge base, so Alice can "learn" from past sales calls. It's been very solid so far!

Kevin Dela Rosa
Cloudglue

Cloudglue

@shcallaway Love to hear it! 🙌

Amy Xiao
Cloudglue

Cloudglue

@shcallaway It's been great working with 11x to tackle the unique challenges of sales recordings. Thanks for trusting us to enable video knowledge for Alice!

Amy Xiao
Cloudglue

Cloudglue [...] Amy Xiao

Also check out our MCP server walkthrough! (Since we could only include one video above!)

No-code, video copilot - we'd love for you to try it out!

Setup:

@amyxst imagine all the possibilities!

Merrill Lutsky
Graphite

Graphite

Congrats @amyxst & team! Every large company I talk to is working to connect and centralize their knowledge bases and context for LLMs. So much of that context lives in videos from customer calls, demos, internal meetings, and more, and Cloudglue unlocks all of it! What have been the most interesting or surprising use cases you've seen so far?

Amy Xiao
Cloudglue

Cloudglue

@merrill\_lutsky 100% This was a large part of what drove us to build Cloudglue - video has to be understood.

results.title: Promo.com: The World's Easiest Video Maker, Now with AI✨ | Product Hunt
results.content:
Launched on December 6th, 2018

View all Promo.com launches

4.7

Based on 12 reviews

Review Promo.com?

Reviewers mostly describe Promo.com as an easy, time-saving video tool that helps freelancers, marketers, and small businesses make polished social content quickly. Repeated praise centers on simple workflows, useful templates, branding support, strong starting assets, and newer AI features that speed up planning and producing batches of videos. One longer review says it became more useful over time for ideas, scheduling, and regular publishing. The main criticism is sharp but isolated: one user reports frustrating cancellation practices and says some transitions and presets feel too slow for commercial work.

# RunwayML Reviews

### The community submitted 17 reviews to tell us what they like about RunwayML, what RunwayML can do better, and more.

4.3

Based on 17 reviews

Review RunwayML? [...] Founder Reviews(10)

Other Reviews(7)

•1 review

A miserable experience. The prices are way too high. If you get the unlimited (Relaxed) subscription, generating a 10 second video takes about 20 minutes. You can't que videos either, you have to wait until they are finished one by one. The AI gets your prompt wrong half the time. Which make you lose time and credits. Then there's the oversensitive censorship. Even people in short-sleeved t-shirts are too risky. They don't tell you what's the problem either. While you're figuring out what exactly is the problem, your account gets suspended. They say you can appeal to this, but that's a lie. They just mention that their decision is final, give no explanation and tell you to go away. Anything is better than this overpriced mess. [...] #### What needs improvement

slow performance (1)high pricing (2)poor prompt adherence (2)limited video queuing (1)censorship issues (1)

Report

 116 views

•1 review

Nowhere near worth the exorbitant pricing. Even with the slightly less expensive Gen 3 Alpha Turbo, there is almost no prompt adherence, even if you follow their prompting guide. And given the extremely high expense, most users won't have the freedom to experiment in order to find that just-right-magical-prompt-wording that will yield any result that even approaches accurate. Even with start images, where most of the work is done for them, the resulting video is disappointing 9 times out of ten. Not worth the money at this time.

#### What needs improvement
